docs.text: To reset your password, open Settings → Security and choose 'Change password'.
Account lockout policy: five failed login attempts trigger a 30-minute lock.
To lock your account and block all sign-ins, use Privacy → Freeze account.
Delete your account permanently under Settings → Danger Zone.
Passwords must be at least 12 characters and include one symbol.
Two-factor authentication sends a one-time code to your phone at each login.
Add a B-tree index so the query planner skips a full table scan.
Cache hot query results in Redis to avoid repeated database hits.
Upgrade to an NVMe SSD to cut database file read latency.
Run VACUUM nightly to reclaim disk space from dead tuples.
Connection pooling reuses open sockets to lower per-request overhead.
Shard the table across nodes to spread write load.
Back off exponentially and retry when you receive HTTP 429 (rate limited).
A 500 Internal Server Error means an unhandled exception on the server.
Use gzip to compress large JSON response bodies over HTTP.
Paginate results with limit and offset to avoid returning huge payloads.
Set a 30-second client timeout to abort stalled requests.
A memory leak is allocated objects that are never released back to the heap.
Stream a file in fixed-size chunks so it never fully loads into RAM.
Increase the JVM heap with -Xmx to allow larger allocations.
Take a heap dump to find which objects dominate retained memory.
Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection.
Hash passwords with bcrypt before storing them.
Escape HTML output to prevent cross-site scripting (XSS).
TLS encrypts data in transit between the client and the server.
Validate and sanitize all user input on the server side.
A load balancer distributes incoming requests across multiple backend servers.
Mount Everest is the highest mountain above sea level on Earth.
The bakery's sourdough needs a 24-hour cold proof in the refrigerator.
Photosynthesis converts sunlight, water, and CO2 into glucose and oxygen.
The 2008 financial crisis was triggered by subprime mortgage defaults.
Regular stretching improves flexibility and reduces injury risk.
A solar eclipse occurs when the Moon passes between the Earth and the Sun.

queries.text: I'm locked out and can't sign in — how do I get back in?
My read query is slow — how do I speed it up?
The API keeps saying I've sent too many requests.
RAM usage climbs forever until the service crashes.
Stop attackers from injecting SQL through my form.
Block other people from signing into my account while I'm away.
Shrink the size of my JSON API responses.
What's the safe way to store user passwords?
Protect my web app against XSS.
Process a CSV far bigger than my available memory.
Spread incoming web traffic across several servers.
Keep the database from running out of disk over time.
